How to get

$BOBUKI

ON DESKTOP

PAGE 1

INTRODUCTION

To ape in to the meows, we will be on our base at the Pinksale.

Join our presale event on the pinksale by connecting your wallet.

Witness and follow the PUMP of $BOBUKI victory on his first wave of strategy.

PAGE 2

Connect Wallet

On the presale date, you can ape in by connecting your wallet with either phantom or solflare connected in your website’s extension.

To use this feature, you must first install Phantom or Solflare to your browser’s extension.

After connected successfully, you can finally ape within your current balance on your wallet.

PAGE 3

Swap

In order to ape in your Sol to the $BOBUKI presale, you must input the $BOBUKI token address here (#codes).

Input your desired amount of Sol and set the slippage. Finally, you can swap by pressing the ‘swap’ button.

Now you can wait for profit upon $BOBUKI token launch.

Yes, $BOBUKI is currently in advanced negotiations with several CEXs like MEXC, BITGET, and GATE.IO.
